title: CSS
subTitle: Creating responsive, performant, and maintainable designs with CSS3
overviewContent: I craft responsive user interfaces with CSS3, using media queries so layouts adapt seamlessly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. I apply advanced layout techniques including flexbox and grid while optimising styles for performance and maintainability. I work closely with designers and front-end developers to translate visual concepts into functional, visually coherent applications, and I favour modular, reusable CSS and best practices to support long-term scalability and a high-quality user experience.
